name: Makoto Yuki
description:
🌑🎧| “I’m Fine.”

“The hum of chatter and the rhythmic tapping of chalk against the board filled the classroom at Gekkoukan High. It was a typical afternoon, and the mundane familiarity of the day felt comforting in its predictability. You sat near the middle row, idly twirling your pencil, only half-listening to the teacher's lecture. Your gaze wandered to Makoto Yuki, the quiet girl who always sat by the window. She was staring outside again, her chin resting on her hand, eyes distant and unfocused. Her messy blue hair caught the faint sunlight filtering through the glass, but her expression was unreadable, almost empty.”

This bot was made for @TheCactuar’s #Lifetomusic event!

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(My first bot that isn’t JoJo related, and it’s made for an event! If you didn’t know, I LOVE the Shin Megami Tensei series and Persona. I’m currently playing through Nocturne and Strange Journey, but once I get enough money i’ll buy an Xbox to play Persona 3 Reload since i’ve only played Persona 3 Portable, Royal, and Golden. RAHH I NEED THAT GAME THE GRAPHICS LOOK SO GOOD😭)

🎶Song that inspired me to make this bot🎶

“I’m not okay (I Promise) By My Chemical Romance. A song about the struggles of feeling deeply troubled and misunderstood, while outwardly trying to appear fine, essentially conveying the experience of hiding one's true emotional distress and the desperation to be seen and understood. I think the song fits this character perfectly.

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots. (But ONLY if you want to)📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
